content.en:
The other side-level genius who was petrified for most of his body didn't come back to his senses at this moment, and he was really frightened.

It stands to reason that the other side level genius has a strong state of mind, and it is impossible to be easily frightened, but he was almost killed by the ruin stone python in seconds, who is not frightened?

They are not Ye Tian, they are real bodies, once they fall, then they are really gone, and no one can calm down!

"It's really thanks to the Infinity Lord, otherwise I would have died just now!"

At this moment, he finally knew the danger here.

Next time, he must be careful and careful, and he must not be captivated by the treasure!

Thundered!!!

Ye Tian directly killed through the entrance of the cave, and the Lord of the Dragon Lizard also killed them.

The four other shore-level geniuses besieged and killed this ruin stone python, still according to the previous cooperation, and quickly injured the ruin stone python and then hit it hard.

As time passed, the giant python gradually found itself in a desperate situation.

"Everyone, be careful, don't let it blow up!"

The Lord of the Golden Moon reminded.

Ye Tian, the Lord of the Dragon Lizard, and the Lord of the Sea Vortex nodded one after another.

They also know this, so they naturally pay attention to it.

Soon.

The stone python was finally on the verge of death and began to blow itself up.

Just a moment before it exploded, Ye Tian, the Lord of the Golden Moon, the Lord of the Dragon Lizard, and the Lord of the Sea Vortex all fled in an instant, and the time was very good, and it was not possible to do it early or late.

If it was early, the Stone Python would follow and blow itself up, and if it was later, it wouldn't be able to escape.

Just right.

This time.

Even if they killed the Stone Python without injury, they don't have to be afraid of the Stone Python.

But.

This is just a ruin stone python, if you encounter several ruin stone pythons at the same time, it will be troublesome.

Naturally, they will not let up, and they have to be very careful.

......

Subsequently.

They continued to move forward, as for those injured Peer-level geniuses, many Peer-level geniuses would not wait for him, they could only let him heal while walking, and walk in the middle.

In the back, there is no need for him to fight in front, he only needs to participate in the formation.

Afterwards.

They found a lot of ruin stones, and the harvest became bigger and bigger.

This mountain range is too big, there are too many passages, and the number of ruin sun stones is not known how many.

Of course.

They also hope that the ruin sun stones here are endless, so that's good!

this day.

The Lord of Mystery and the other geniuses of the other side level had sensed a lot of ruin sun light, which meant that there were a lot of ruin sun stones there.

However, instead of getting excited, they got nervous.

There are so many ruin sun lights, which means that there are a lot of ruin yang stones, and the possibility of having a ruin stone python is very high.

"Everyone, be careful, I suspect more than one Stone Python!"

Ye Tian said.

"No, creatures like the Stone Python don't live in groups, do they?"

The Lord of the Dragon Lizard.

Abandon?

That's impossible!

With so many ruin stones, no one wants to give up.

Naturally, the Lord of Mystic didn't want to give up.

So, she said: "Everyone, let's go over and take a look, everyone has arranged the formation in advance, and then go over!"

As soon as the Lord of Mystery said this, the other other shore-level geniuses naturally did so.

Soon.

They set up the formation, and then followed Ye Tian, the Lord of the Golden Moon, the Lord of the Dragon Lizard, and the Lord of the Sea Vortex.

Ye Tian took out the Origin Rule weapon, and so did the Lord of the Dragon Lizard, ready to fight.

As soon as they came here, they went in.

Then.

They did see that there were ruin stones on the stone walls, and there were a lot of them.

As for the ruin stone python, I haven't seen it yet.

Seeing so many ruin stones, the Lord of Mystery and the other shore-level geniuses were all excited.

However, Ye Tian and the others did not dare to be careless.

"Lord of Xuanmiao, you let them dig up the Ruin Yang Stone, we are vigilant here, if there is a Ruin Stone Python coming, we will stop it immediately!" Ye Tian admonished.

"Hmm!"

The Lord of the Mystic also thinks this method is good.

Soon.

The other other shore-level geniuses began to excavate the ruin sun stone here, one by one carefully.

After only digging for a while, a lot of ruin stones were excavated.

And this time.

Ye Tian's copying talent finally sensed that a ruin stone python was coming.

So, he reminded the other other geniuses: "Be careful, there is a ruined stone python coming!"

Whoa!!

The lord of the dragon lizard, they were immediately ready for battle.

Soon, the ruined stone python appeared.

Without saying a word, the battle began!

Thundered!!!!

Under the impact of the battle, the other other shore-level geniuses had no way to continue collecting the Ruin Yang Stone, so they could only retreat.

However, not long after the battle, the face of the Lord of Mystic changed drastically.

Because, another stone python appeared.

"Trouble, there's another stone python!"

"Lord of Mysteries, what should I do, do you want to withdraw?"

"If you don't withdraw, these two ruin stone pythons will not be easy to deal with, and if the two ruin stone pythons explode, it will be troublesome, and the dragon lizard lords may have to fall one or two!"

Although they are not familiar with the Lord of the Dragon Lizard, if the Lord of the Dragon Lizard has fallen, then they will be in danger in the future.

With the lord of the dragon lizard in front of them, they are safer.

So, they don't like the Lord of the Dragons the most, they're down!

"Wait!"

The Lord of Mystery said.

After all, even the Lord of the Dragon Lizard didn't say to escape, so she naturally had to wait.

......

I saw another stone python coming.

Ye Tiandao: "The three of you deal with this ruin stone python, I will deal with this ruin stone python!"

Seeing that Ye Tian was going to deal with a giant python alone, the lord of the dragon lizard was naturally willing.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian dealt with a ruin stone python, and the other three other shore-level geniuses dealt with another ruin stone python.

Thundered!!!!!

The battle is on!

Even if Ye Tian didn't use the supreme technique on the other side, with his current strength, he could suppress the ruin stone python.

And the other three other shore-level geniuses should have no problem killing a ruin stone python.

Therefore, it only took a little longer, but they could still kill the two stone pythons.

They also only think that there are only two stone pythons.

But soon, Ye Tian's face changed.

"Lord of the Mysteries, you run away, there is another Stone Python! No, there are two Stone Pythons!"

Ye Tian shouted.

Hearing Ye Tian's words, the Lord of Xuan Miao was terrified.
